title: Confusing BAD_TYPE_OF_FIELD error
description:
### Describe the bug
Not sure if the issue is from DeltaLake, the Dynamic and JSON types, or the new Parquet reader.
### How to reproduce
Create the table with [spark.py](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22560404/spark.py). Then, in ClickHouse run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Dynamic) ENGINE = DeltaLakeLocal(local, format = 'Parquet', path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/spark_catalog/test/t0');
SELECT count() FROM t0 WHERE c0 = '{"c1":1}'::JSON SETTINGS delta_lake_enable_engine_predicate = 0; --error
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> TCPHandler: Code: 169. DB::Exception: Cannot compare std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>> with DB::Object: (in file/uri /var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/spark_catalog/test/t0/part-00023-18b75b44-1183-4329-ab84-3022c76a3642-c000.snappy.parquet): While executing ParquetBlockInputFormat: While executing ReadFromObjectStorage. (BAD_TYPE_OF_FIELD), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):

1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:128: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x0000000014816a69
2. src/Common/Exception.h:123: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d26e18e
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d26db91
4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<String, String>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<String>::type, std::type_identity<String>::type>, String&&, String&&) @ 0x000000000d26c476

6. src/Common/FieldVisitors.h:34: auto DB::Field::dispatch<auto DB::applyVisitor<DB::FieldVisitorAccurateLess, DB::Field const&, DB::Field const&>(DB::FieldVisitorAccurateLess&&, DB::Field const&, DB::Field const&)::'lambda'(DB::FieldVisitorAccurateLess&), DB::Field const&>(DB::FieldVisitorAccurateLess&&, DB::Field const&) @ 0x000000001484a1b9
7. src/Common/FieldVisitors.h:31: DB::accurateLess(DB::Field const&, DB::Field const&) @ 0x0000000014823163
8. src/Core/Range.cpp:105: DB::Range::intersectsRange(DB::Range const&) const @ 0x000000001a4c2b1a

31. start_thread @ 0x00000000000a27f
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT UNSIGNED, data JSON) ENGINE = InnoDB;
INSERT INTO t1 (id, data) VALUES (1, '{"key":"value1"}'), (2, '{"key":"value2"}'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT UNSIGNED, json_data JSON) ENGINE = InnoDB;
INSERT INTO t2 (id, json_data) VALUES (1, '{"c1":1}'), (2, '{"c1":2}'), (3, NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE data = '{"key":"value1"}';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2 WHERE json_data = '{"c1":1}';
key_bug_features: Comparing Dynamic type with JSON format causes error
